project_title: CI red-cell methods reference architecture (post-integrity-correction rebuild)
product_name: CI red-cell methods reference architecture (post-integrity-correction rebuild)
final_object_type: analytic method or human-AI evaluation module
runtime_target: structured public page plus project-specific data packet and proof runner
operational_end_state: A user can apply a method, compare baseline and method-supported reasoning, record human judgment, and preserve the claim boundary.
full_build_definition: An instrument with input, rule or rubric, analyst action, scoring or classification output, replay log, falsifier, and evidence-bound acceptance criteria.
minimum_operational_release: A usable instrument for CI red-cell methods reference architecture (post-integrity-correction rebuild): sample input, analytic rule, analyst or model action, output, scoring or review gate, and falsification test.
required_modules_to_build: item registry | authority classifier | route selector | promotion decision
source_status: 5 source-application rows; 1 active passage contracts; 0 unlocated source candidates.
source_actions_before_claim: Complete 1 close-read contract(s), update 3 linked proof-capsule field(s), and preserve the current claim ceiling until passage notes exist.
test_suite: claim ceiling test: public claims cannot exceed built evidence | source test: metadata-routed sources require close reading before citation or quotation | privacy test: no local paths or private directories in public deploy | promotion test: item cannot advance without identity, authority, route, and next action
acceptance_tests: Run the instrument on a sample input; verify rule application, output trace, scoring/review decision, falsifier, and claim ceiling.
promotion_stage: prototype-to-full-build; source and capture checks still govern release language
current_status: source-backed proof build; needs source-to-output capture and close-read strengthening
launch_or_review_path: Open the instrument contract for `mb-ci-red-cell-handoff`, run the sample input through the rule/rubric, and capture the output and falsifier.
first_full_build: Add promotion-router examples showing how a packet becomes a room, paper, software instrument, source reservoir, archive item, or blocked record.
next_implementation_steps: 1. create or confirm runtime data schema; 2. implement one end-to-end fixture; 3. capture proof artifact; 4. run source and claim-ceiling gates; 5. publish reviewer-safe demo
public_claim_now: May claim a prototype-to-full-build path exists; do not claim completed operational system.
claim_boundary: This is a full-build plan, not a claim that the full operational system has already been completed.
